---
title: "Curriculum vitae"
output: 
  html_document:
    css: ['styles.css']
    includes:
      after_body: footer.html
---

Below is the most up-to-date version of my curriculum vitae.

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1APAGora7ngAvIU1O9wxhfiIrhsSxQgdp/view?usp=sharing&embedded=true" style="width:100%; height:800px; border:none;" frameborder="0"> </iframe>
